headline: Anthropic confirmation cycle. Composite 60.0 sustained at the Established/Functional band boundary. Pentagon explicitly excluded Anthropic from the May 1 classified-AI cohort — a positive differentiation reflecting Anthropic's continued refusal to remove restrictions on lethal autonomous weapons and domestic mass surveillance. This refusal carries real cost (the contract opportunity itself plus the DC Circuit hearing pending May 19). Mythos breach disclosure gap remains open. May 11 safeguard-goal commitment not yet delivered. The Pentagon-exclusion contrast already factored at May 3 assessment. No structural change in window. Boundary-flag protocol sustained. Re-queue scheduled May 19 post-DC-Circuit oral arguments.
